# tf_cloud_workspace

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Create multiple Terraform Cloud runner targets.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_cloud_workspace")

tf_cloud_workspace(
    name = "prod",
    module = ":my_module",
    workspace_name = "my-workspace-prod",
    organization = "my-org",
)
```

See [Cloud Integration Overview](README.md) for more information.
